title: DIG Network health.json
description: Tiny machine summary of DIG Network health for quick agent polling. A pure projection of status.json (same overall + generatedAt) carrying only a flat {systemId: status} map — no latency, detail, or history. Fetch this instead of the full status.json when you only need the rollup + per-system states.

$schema.description: Self-reference to this JSON Schema, so the document is self-describing.

schemaVersion.description: Version of THIS document schema; kept in lockstep with status.schema.json.

overall.description: Worst-of rollup across all non-excluded systems (identical to status.json's overall).

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the underlying snapshot (identical to status.json's generatedAt).

systems.description: Flat map of stable system id -> health state.
